test.name: PGP-34678 Verify Upi collect Tab on Enhanced web
PGP-29589 - Flexi subscription testcases for renewal with upi
Verify UPI Collect timer is starting from 5 minutes

parameter.value: Nexus 5

parameter.name: userAgent

test.name: NATIVE : MCC ADDNPAY and ADDMONEY UPIPUSH
Fetch payment instrument for offline txn

exclude.name: test when head requestTimestamp is not provided
test when head requestTimestamp equals random value
test when head tokenType is not provided
test CHECK_UPI_ACCOUNT_EXISTS=N on merchant error will invoke
test when head token equals checksum generated using different merchant's key
test when head tokenType equals random value
test when head requestId is not provided
test error message is retuned in response is incorrect mobileNumber is sent in request body
test when head channelId equals random value
test with invalid checksum it should invoke error
test success response if all mandatory parameters are sent and correct
test error message is retuned in response is incorrect mid is sent in request body
test mid is mandatory parameter and error message is returned in case mid is not send in request body
test upiAccountWithTokenExists=false upi account doesnot exist for a number
test when head channelId is not provided
test SSO token support is removed from the api
test when head requestId equals random value

parameter.name: mobileEmulation
parameter.value: Nexus 5

parameter.name: userAgent
parameter.value: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 6_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/536.26 (KHTML,like Gecko) Version/6.0 Mobile/10A5376e Safari/8536.25
